profiles.purpose: Cheap setup validation for HF Jobs, dataset upload, LoRA save, and basic code instruction following.
Dedicated GeoSeal coding-agent lane for cross-language slot preservation and governed shell behavior.
Adds the binary interpretation matrix as deterministic low-level coding substrate for the next online training pass.
Adds live GeoSeal CLI help and workflow command recall records to target smoke-eval command failures.
Adds runtime-verified command harmony records for binary slots, cross-language command outputs, and structural-vs-runtime convergence.

Concentrated repair after command-harmony-v5 failed the inline gate 1/4. Adds forced-prefix signal-shape rows for exact CLI markers, provider lane signaling, analog actions, and runtime-vs-structural boundaries.
Gated Stage 6 after command harmony. Adds token-to-binary semantic chemistry workflow records and resource-decay fallback/re-advance records only after baseline command harmony is mastered.

Repair pass after frozen Stage 6 smoke eval failed. Adds analog records for byte/hex markers, lane separation, resource hold, steady-state fallback, momentum damping, and re-advance before any merged coding-model promotion.
Stage 6 repair continuation retained for status, smoke-eval, and merge traceability.
Stage 6 repair continuation retained for status, smoke-eval, and merge traceability.
Stage 6 repair baseline that recovered part of the frozen gate and informs later constrained-decoding or DPO pivots.
Stage 6 repair experiment retained for regression comparison against v10 and v12.
Current gated Stage 6 repair target. Trains asymmetric forced-prefix records and blocks adapter push unless the frozen Stage 6 contract passes.

Confirmed DPO adapter after v12 failed the frozen Stage 6 boss gate. Uses analog DPO rows plus the GeoSeal constrained-checklist scaffold, passed 5/5 in HF job 69f587579d85bec4d76f0297, and pushed to Hugging Face.

Adds the full coding system as a gated lane: code primaries, music-theory harmony, atomic tokenizer rows, binary/hex transport, code-lane contracts, and workflow composition as separate aligned evidence lanes.
Builder/Navigator pair-agent behavior for GeoShell. Useful after core Stage 6 and CA/GeoSeal command recall are stable.
Focused repair adapter for merged-model smoke failures: CA abs/add opcode recall and runnable depth-2 JSON key extraction.
Narrow exact-byte repair after direct adapter smoke reached 3/4 but confused CA add with abs; drills abs=0x09, add=0x00, sequence 0x09,0x09,0x00.
Combined direct-smoke repair for exact CA abs/add byte sequence and runnable depth-2 JSON key code after separate v1/v2 repairs each reached 3/4.

First confirmed harnessed coding-agent full model. General coding is handled by merged model weights; exact CA opcode planning is routed through scbe_code.ca-plan. Passed 4/4 harness smoke in HF job 69f5a24298a8d679adfb8713.

prompts.prompt: Write a Python function add(a, b) that returns a + b. Then give a slot map for a, b, and return.
Translate KO/Python to RU/Rust and preserve slots. Source: def is_even(n): return n % 2 == 0
Give the exact GeoSeal CLI command sequence to build an execution shell from inline Python add code and then run the route from the saved execution_shell.json.
Show the GeoSeal CLI commands for Polly Pad portal-box and stream-wheel using inline Python add code.
Show how to ask GeoSeal for a Mermaid code graph of src/geoseal_cli.py with calls included.

Show the current GeoSeal CLI command that prints the harness terminal as machine-readable JSON without probing the bridge. Include a two-model Ollama-to-DeepSeek example and the required provider-pair signal shape.

Explain a Stage 6 atomic workflow decision where token-to-hex evidence and semantic overlay stay separate, a resource overrun is predicted before commit, and the system uses steady-state fallback plus re-advance.

Map a safe add operation through KO/Python, AV/TypeScript, and RU/Rust using code primaries, music-theory harmony, atomic tokenizer rows, binary/hex transport, and lane contracts. Keep semantic and transport lanes separate.

promotion_gate.notes: Loss alone is not enough. Promotion requires target-language compliance plus GeoSeal command-surface recall.
